problem.line1: Your child is growing every day.
problem.line2: And yet, the important things slip by. It's not bad parenting.

solution.line1: guides your child's growth, one day at a time.
solution.line3: Falak builds the routine, tracks progress, and nudges you when it counts.

ui.guaranteeDesc: Try Memorae risk-free. If you're not satisfied within 14 days, we'll refund your payment. No questions asked.
ui.supernovaHeading: Everything you can unlock with the Supernova
ui.faqSubheading: Have questions? We answer them here.

chaos.heading: Chaos won't win twice.
chaos.subheading: We're not here to create just another app.
chaos.card1: We don't organize lives: we decompress them.
chaos.card1Body1: Chaos isn't solved with more tools. It's removed by taking away friction.
chaos.card1Body2: Memorae converts messages into tasks, emails into plans, ideas into action. Without you having to think twice.
chaos.card2Example: Remember to send the report to your boss today before 4:00 PM.
chaos.card2Body1: We don't compete with other apps. We compete with what escapes you. With the important things that never happen. With the mental load that exhausts.
chaos.card2Body2: We don't sell features. We sell clarity. And clarity is power.
chaos.card3: We're not just an app. We're a shift in logic.
chaos.card3Body: We don't design for you to look at it. We design it so you barely notice it. Memorae doesn't seek attention — it acts when you need it and disappears afterward.
chaos.card4: What we are creating doesn't exist.
chaos.card4Body1: We don't add functions. We're building a mental operating system.
chaos.card4Body2: A new category, a new habit, a new way of living. With a clear head. And life under control.
chaos.appBody: The world doesn't need more disconnected tools. It needs fewer things in the head. Memorae integrates into the channels you already use. Centralize what matters. Reduce friction. Clear your mind.

features.card0User: Memorae, add "buy milk and fruit" to my grocery list.
features.card0Bot: Done, I've added "buy milk and fruit" to your grocery list. Let me know when you arrive so I can send it to you.
features.card1User: Memorae, show me what's still left to do on the "Today" list
features.card1Bot: Showing you only the pending items on the "Today" list
features.card2User: Memorae, show me my "Business Ideas" list and remind me to review it on Saturday at 10. 💡
features.card2Bot: Here is your "Business Ideas" list; I'll send it to you again on Saturday at 10.
features.card3User: Memorae, tomorrow at 9 remind me of everything left on the "Admin" list.
features.card3Bot: Perfect, tomorrow at 9 I'll send you what's pending on the "Admin" list.
features.card4User: Memorae, in the "Home" list, mark everything as done except "paint room".
features.card4Bot: I've marked the rest as done; only "paint room" remains.
features.card5User: Memorae, in the "Today" list put "send report to Laura" first.
features.card5Bot: I've moved "send report to Laura" to the top of the "Today" list. 🔄
features.card6User: Memorae, draft an email to John confirming our meeting for Tuesday at 10 AM.
features.card6Bot: Drafted. Subject: Meeting Confirmation. 'Hi John, confirming our meeting for Tuesday at 10 AM...'
features.card7User: Memorae, do I have any free time on Friday afternoon?
features.card7Bot: Checking your calendars... You have a free slot between 2 PM and 4 PM on Friday.
features.card8User: Memorae, save this invoice in the Vault so I don't lose it.
features.card8Bot: Saved to the Vault. You can find it anytime by searching for 'invoice'.
features.card9User: Memorae, remind Sarah to bring the snacks for the party.
features.card9Bot: I've sent a reminder to Sarah: 'Don't forget the snacks for the party!'
features.card10User: [Uploads photo of flyer] Memorae, add this event to my calendar.
features.card10Bot: Added 'Jazz Night' to your calendar for Saturday at 8 PM, based on the flyer.

footer.tagline: You just live. Memorae remembers for you.
footer.subtitle: Your to-do list asked us for help. Here we are.

seo.title: Memorae | Your personal memory assistant
seo.description: Memorae helps you remember, organize, and act. Unlimited reminders, smart lists, and AI-powered memory across WhatsApp, Telegram, email, and the Memorae App.

testimonials.t0Quote: Without a doubt, it's the best tool I've subscribed to this year. Keep up the good work!
testimonials.t1Quote: I have ADHD and this tool has completely changed my life. It's like having a second brain! 🧠
testimonials.t2Quote: Thanks to Memorae! It's something that has changed my life and saved it. Yesterday I discovered the friend reminders feature and it was like: wooooooooooooooooooow!
testimonials.t3Quote: A marvel. Now my memory has a name, and it's called Memorae.
testimonials.t4Title: The best invention of the century
testimonials.t4Quote: Since I started using it, it's impossible for me to forget anything. Imagine now that I can also make sure others don't forget! The best invention of the century for people who live life at 200 km/h.
testimonials.t5Title: The best thing that ever happened to me
testimonials.t5Quote: The best tool I've ever subscribed to. I haven't forgotten a task or a gift since. It's been one of the best investments of my life.
testimonials.t6Quote: Finally, a new version of the Asian saying: 'Remind me to remind you so you remember to do such and such.' I love it! 😄
testimonials.t7Quote: Memorae has been a game-changer for me! It helps me remember everything from important work tasks to the smallest details of my daily life. Now my mind is free to focus on what really matters, because Memorae remembers everything for me. I've even noticed I'm much less stressed!
testimonials.t8Quote: At first I was a little hesitant, and in fact my first real test was asking Memorae to remind me to cancel my subscription the day before the trial period ended. Obviously, that was the most useless reminder ever. This is brilliant!
testimonials.t9Quote: I used to keep sending text and voice notes to myself all the time. This has really changed that for me and also a lot of embarrassment asking her to remind me personal things.
testimonials.t10Title: How could I live without it?
testimonials.t10Quote: Gosh, this tool has been incredible. It's been such a lifesaver in a short space of time.
testimonials.t11Quote: Life changer. It just makes my life so much easier. Forever grateful to the creators. I even call it 'Memo' now, that's how close we are. And with everything new that's coming... it's simply phenomenal 🤩

pricing.guaranteeDesc: Try it for free. Then you have a full 14 days to request a complete refund. No questions, no forms, just your money back.

faq.q0: What is Memorae and how can it help me?
faq.a0: Memorae is your personal memory assistant. It helps you remember, organize, and act on everything that matters — from daily reminders to long-term goals. Just tell Memorae what you need, and it takes care of the rest.
faq.q1: What types of reminders and features does Memorae offer?
faq.a1: Memorae offers unlimited reminders, smart lists, daily briefings, friend-to-friend reminders, Google Workspace integration, action from images, inbox organization, and much more depending on your plan.
faq.a2: Yes! You can set reminders that repeat daily, weekly, monthly, or on custom schedules. Memorae will keep reminding you until you mark them as done.
faq.q3: Does Memorae spy on me or can I sleep peacefully knowing my data is safe?
faq.a3: Your privacy is our top priority. Memorae does not read, analyze, or sell your personal data. All communications are encrypted, and you remain in full control of your information at all times.
faq.q4: How does Memorae protect my privacy and data security?
faq.a4: We use end-to-end encryption for all messages, store data on secure servers, and follow strict data protection regulations. Your data is never shared with third parties.
faq.q5: What advantages does Memorae offer compared to other tools?
faq.a5: Memorae integrates directly into the channels you already use (WhatsApp, Telegram, email), understands natural language, remembers context from past conversations, and acts proactively on your behalf.
faq.a6: Yes, Memorae is available around the clock, 365 days a year. Your memory assistant never sleeps, so you can rely on it anytime.
faq.q7: Does Memorae sync with calendars like Google Calendar?
faq.a7: Absolutely! Memorae syncs with Google Calendar and other calendar services, so your reminders and events are always up to date across all your devices.
faq.q8: Are there limits to the number of reminders I can set up?
faq.a8: With any paid plan, you get unlimited reminders. There are no caps on how many reminders, lists, or memory items you can create.
